positive: A whimsical, stylized portrait of a mythical forest creature – a blend of deer, fox, and luminous moths – standing in a grove of glowing bioluminescent flora. The creature has an elegant, flowing silhouette against a deep indigo and emerald background. Strong backlighting illuminates the edges of the subject (rim lighting), creating high contrast. Use a detailed, flat vector illustration style mixed with luminous watercolor effects. The composition must be perfectly centered, designed for maximum visual impact on apparel. Theme: 'Ethereal Woodland Guardian'. --ar 1:1 --style fantasy print
negative: blur, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, noisy, jpeg artifacts, low quality, disfigured, dull colors
